spec_worktree: main checkout (doc-only; spec worktree skipped per product-owner option A — no code, sparse worktree excludes my-docs)
objective: Ratify the Phase 0 architecture decisions: write the 17 seed ADRs (ADR-0002 through ADR-0017, ADR-0001 pre-existing), bake the three deferred Context Map hotspots (#1, #6, #7) into the relevant ADRs, add the glossary v1.1 note, and mark the deferred hotspots resolved by #3.
invariants: ADRs are single-decision records; the design vision is not stuffed into ADR-0013 (it has its own design-direction pointer doc).
Hotspot A/C extend existing seed ADRs ADR-0006/0015 (DRY); only Hotspot B gets a new ADR (ADR-0017).
Approval & Security owns and applies the risk policy; Orchestration only sends intent.
The Git commit is the sole durable fence, covering only the Concept-write order (file then commit); index rebuild and external side-effects are out of scope of that fence.
Glossary v1.1 adds a note only; no term is moved between bounded-context columns.
No runtime RiskLevel is inferred from GitHub Project Risk.
R3 human ratification is required to canonicalize #3; the grilling verbal ratification of the decision grid is not the formal issue-level R3 gate.
decisions: 16 new ADRs written (ADR-0002..ADR-0017) plus the pre-existing ADR-0001 — full WP-0.3 seed ADR set of 17.

ADR-0006 resolves hotspot #1: ingestion of local OKF canonical record + derived index is R2 (not R1); credential/external ingestion is R3 as a separate row; Approval & Security owns AND applies the policy; Orchestration sends intent only.

ADR-0015 resolves hotspot #7: the Git commit is the sole durable fence, covering only the Concept-write order (file then commit); a pre-commit crash writes nothing; index rebuild is out of the fence (rebuildable); external side-effects are out of scope (separate R3 + rule); KnowledgeWriter lives in Elixir Core.
ADR-0017 resolves hotspot #6: direct Published Language route (not Integration ACL); Tool Lab publishes, Knowledge consumes; Orchestration promotion Command carries a reference, not a payload.
ADR-0007 keeps the macOS Podman edge decisive but conditioned on WP-0.5 spike validation; revise only if an edge arises.

ADR-0013 stays StyleX-only; the product design vision (Japon minimalism, mockups, Design System, Agent Characters, Skill Icons, visual approval loop) is pointed to by my-docs/plan/2026-07-14-yula-design-direction.md for later Faz 1 drafting.
Glossary v1 → v1.1: one note added under EvaluationArtifactSnapshot and ConversionArtifact (shared Published Language; Tool Lab publishes, Knowledge consumes); no term moved.
Context Map conclusion hotspots #1, #6, #7 marked resolved by ADR-0006, ADR-0017, ADR-0015 respectively; a #3 resolution section added.
Plan §11 grows 16 → 17 ADRs (ADR-0017 row added); WP-0.3 acceptance criterion updated to ADR-0001…0017; plan.html dashboard and verify-plan-html.mjs synchronized to 17 ADRs.
implementation_state: All 16 new ADR files written under my-docs/adr/ (ADR-0002 through ADR-0017), compact single-decision records in the ADR-0001 format with Status/Date/Provenance/Decision/Consequences. The three deferred Context Map hotspots (#1 risk assignment, #6 Tool Lab→Knowledge route, #7 KnowledgeWriter recovery) are baked into ADR-0006, ADR-0017, and ADR-0015 respectively. Glossary bumped to v1.1 with a single producer/consumer note and the three out-of-scope items marked resolved-by-ADR. Context Map conclusion updated with resolved-by pointers and an issue-#3 resolution section. Plan §11 and the WP-0.3 acceptance criterion updated to 17 ADRs; the plan.html dashboard and verify-plan-html.mjs synchronized. A design-direction pointer doc created for the Faz 1 product design vision so ADR-0013 stays StyleX-only. All written on branch feature/3-seed-adrs in the main checkout (spec worktree skipped — #3 is doc-only and the sparse worktree excludes my-docs). Not yet merged; awaiting product-owner R3 ratification.
